name: Elbmesh Review MR Readiness
title: Review Elbmesh MR Readiness
summary: Review a phase-scoped Elbmesh PR/MR against its GitHub Issue, tests, Rust quality gates, named error rules, documentation, and architecture boundaries before merge.
description: Use this task for final merge/change-request decisions. Use the general review-change task for non-final code review.

outputs.title: Required follow-up tasks and residual risks

validations.title: Merge readiness review
passCriteria: The MR matches the active phase and GitHub Issue, and links or closes its Issue where applicable.
Tests exist for every changed behavior and were written before implementation or the exception is explained.
Formatting, clippy, tests, named framework/runtime errors, and ActionFailure domain errors are checked.
Resource/Action/Event/Reaction/View/External Operation boundaries and docs/PPP guidance updates are checked.
The decision is merge only when all gates pass; otherwise request changes.

items: Read docs/GOAL.md, docs/GLOSSARY.md, docs/DEVELOPMENT_WORKFLOW.md, docs/PHASED_DELIVERY_PLAN.md, docs/AGENT_SKILLS.md, docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md, relevant ADRs, the Issue, MR diff, tests, and verification evidence.
Report findings first, ordered by severity, then quality gate status, merge/change-request decision, follow-up tasks, and residual risks.
Check the MR matches its active phase and GitHub Issue, links or closes the Issue, and contains no unplanned behavior or unrelated refactors.
Check tests for every changed behavior, Rust quality gates, named error types, and ActionFailure domain errors where relevant.
Reject merge if any quality gate fails, scope is unplanned, docs are missing, or architecture drift is unresolved.
